title: Sabretooth
content:
{{SomethingElse|Peggy Carter from the "[[Sabretooth Peggy Carter Universe]]"|Peggy Carter/Sabretooth Peggy Carter|Sabretooth}}
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=the 20th Century Fox Movies}}

{{Quote|I know [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|you]].|Sabretooth to [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
'''{{Conjecture|Victor Creed}}''' was a [[mutant]] with animal-like abilities which led to him taking on the name '''Sabretooth''', eventually being banished to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] by the [[Time Variance Authority]]. Having joined [[Cassandra Nova]]'s rogue group of [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen|henchmen]], he encountered [[Deadpool]] and his alternate half-brother, [[Wolverine]], before challenging Wolverine and was swiftly decapitated by him.

==Biography==
{{MD|Victor Creed (Earth-10005)||1}}
===Early Life===
====Brother of Logan====
{{Quote|Sabretooth. [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Your]] brother.|[[Deadpool]] to [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
Sabretooth was a [[mutant]] with regenerative abilities and retractable claws at his nails. He grew up alongside his half-brother [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Logan]] in [[Canada]]. The pair eventually became enemies.{{Ref|DW}}

===Life in the Void===
====Cassandra Nova's Henchman====
[[File:Sabretooth and Pyro in the Void.png|{{AltFloat}}|Sabretooth prepares to kill [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]]]
{{Quote|Ready to die?!|Sabretooth to [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}}
Eventually, he was pruned by the [[Time Variance Authority]], ending up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where he joined [[Cassandra Nova's Henchmen]]. Sabretooth was marauding alongside other members of the crew when they encountered [[Human Torch/Void-Analyzing Fantastic Four|Johnny Storm]], [[Deadpool]], and an alternate [[Wolverine]], the latter two of which had just arrived in the Void themselves. Recognizing Wolverine, Sabretooth dismounted from his [[Mag Truck|vehicle]] and challenged his half-brother to a duel. Before they could begin, however, Deadpool took the time to clean Wolverine up and give him strategy advice, to Wolverine's annoyance.
[[File:Wolverine and Sabertooth charging at each other.png|{{AltFloat}}|Sabretooth charges at [[Wolverine]]]]
The two then charged at each other, roaring, but Sabretooth was swiftly decapitated by Wolverine's claws, his body dropping to the ground at Deadpool's feet. Taking Sabretooth's severed head in his hand, Deadpool challenged the other marauders, with Wolverine taunting "Who's next?" However, they were quickly incapacitated by [[Toad]] using a large magnet attached to the Mag Truck.{{Ref|DW}}

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
{{Expand}}
*'''Mutant Physiology''': As a [[mutant]], Sabretooth had excessive hair all over, fangs and far more muscle mass than a normal [[human]]. He also had extendable claws in place of nails.
**'''Superhuman Strength''': Sabretooth possessed high levels of superhuman strength, which varied at times due to ongoing and subsequent mutations.
**'''Superhuman Durability''': Sabretooth's superhuman durability grants him the ability to withstand a significant amount of physical punishment.
**'''Superhuman Speed''': Sabretooth's speed appeared to outrun [[Wolverine]] when he and his alternate half-brother charged at each other.
** '''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Stamina''': ''To be added''
**'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Sabretooth had remarkable reflexes and reactions, which were far superior to those of the finest human athletes. He was able to react at tremendous speeds.
**'''Enhanced Senses''': ''To be added''
**'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Sabretooth's body could quickly heal from any injuries dealt. However, this power had its limits, as he was unable to survive being decapitated by [[Wolverine]].
**'''Longevity''': Sabretooth had been alive about as long as [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Wolverine]].
**[[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Nice (5).png|thumb|250px|Sabretooth with his claws out]]'''Retractable Claws''': Sabretooth had ten retractable 3-inch talons in place of fingernails.

===Abilities===
{{Expand}}
''To be added''

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Victor Creed, also known as Sabretooth, is a [[mutant]] who is commonly depicted as a primary antagonist towards the [[X-Men]], and as the archenemy of [[Wolverine]]. The two characters share a history together as former participants in the Weapon X program and as part of the [[CIA]]-based mutant black ops unit Team X. Through these experiences, Creed became obsessed with hunting Logan in an attempt to re-awaken his primal characteristics, which he suppressed since escaping Weapon X and joining the X-Men.
*In {{WPS|20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Victor Creed is the half-brother of [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|James Howlett]], who stood by his side for decades. Once the two joined a group called {{WPS|Team X (comics)|Team X}}, Creed started hunting other mutants including his own brother. Eventually, Creed joined [[Magneto/Earth-10005|Magneto]] in his efforts against [[humans]].

==Behind the Scenes==
*Sabretooth in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Tyler Mane]] with {{WPS|Liev Schreiber}} as a younger Sabretooth and {{WPS|Michael James Olsen}} as a teenage Victor Creed.
*Sabretooth's inclusion in ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' was a personal idea from co-writer [[Zeb Wells (writer)|Zeb Wells]], who was a fan of [[Tyler Mane]]'s Sabretooth version, hence why the character was included since the first draft and was never removed, as the filmmakers felt excited at seeing Wells excited at his idea.<ref>[https://variety.com/2024/film/news/shawn-levy-deadpool-and-wolverine-spoilers-cameos-1236089059/ Shawn Levy Unpacks ‘Deadpool & Wolverine’ Cameos and Spoilers: Channing Tatum’s Gambit, Jennifer Garner’s Ben Affleck Divorce Joke, Henry Cavill’s Wolverine and More]</ref>
*Sabretooth's decapitation is a callback to ''{{WPS|X-Men Origins: Wolverine}}'', in which he taunts [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Wolverine]] by asking him if he knows how to even kill him, to which Wolverine replies he would try by cutting off his head.
*[[Miles Ley]] was the stunt double for [[Tyler Mane]] in the role of Sabretooth.
